mnemonics.title: PEAS
mnemonics.content: Please Eat All Spinach. (Performance, Environment, Actuators, Sensors)

mnemonics.title: Environment Classification (Key Properties)
mnemonics.content: Old People Don't Sing During Church. (Observable, multi-agent, Deterministic, Stochastic, Dynamic, Continuous) - Note: This covers 6 of the 7 key properties.

mnemonics.title: Agent Types (Simple to Complex)
mnemonics.content: Some Men Get Useful Lessons. (Simple reflex, Model-based, Goal-based, Utility-based, Learning agent)
